reason: Successfully executed all steps to test the agent's ability to use the GitHub tool and retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username with proper account access flow.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Step 2: Found and clicked "QA-20260421-010157-y7w1" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened, displaying landing page with message input
Step 3: Verified agent status — Status confirmed as "idle" (shown in status indicator and sidebar)
Step 4: Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message typed and sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Step 5a: GitHub account access request card appeared — Card displayed asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated username?"
Step 5b: Selected GitHub account (already checked) and clicked "Allow Access (1)" — Access granted, agent resumed processing
Step 5c: API request review dialog appeared — Dialog showed GitHub GET /user endpoint request, clicked "Allow Once" to permit the request
Step 6: Waited for response — Agent processed request and completed work (took approximately 1 minute 32 seconds)
Step 7: Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with tool cards showing successful GitHub account access request and bash execution
